propositions: Run the ADR-0036 version-segmented threshold replay for the plan-v2 impact model (calibration 3) and adjudicate current blocking thresholds against it.
Extend the calibration script's load() and main() to count and print skipped sidecars by reason (different-version vs untagged) alongside the segment size.
Adjudicate each non-DET blocking-tier criterion into KEEP/RAISE/LOWER/DEMOTE using the pre-registered decision rule, citing each criterion's replay row signals.
Under plan-v2 no criterion reaches BLOCK-ELIGIBLE; the outcome is one demotion (T5e to advisory, FP-PRONE) and ten keeps.

Perform floor-attribution analysis over plan-v2 block findings by recomputing impact_plan with the hard-override floor disabled, reporting floor-driven count/share overall and for ac_unverifiable findings, plus missing_oracle/underspecified_oracle/ambiguous proportions.
Land the script counter, the Calibration 3 doc section, and any warranted criteria_routing.json threshold edits via a single merged Gerrit change.
